Testing Obfuscation and Optimization Edge Cases

param_opaque_predicate(10): 10
call_opaque_predicate(): 20
param_instruction_substitution(5): 225
param_string_encryption(): 152
param_tail_call_optimized(1000): 500500
param_non_tail_call(100): 5050
param_vectorized_loop(8): 72
param_link_time_optimization(5): 20
call_division_by_zero(): 2
call_null_pointer_deref(): 41
call_buffer_overflow(): 30
call_integer_overflow(): 2000000000
call_undefined_behavior(): 10
call_implementation_defined(): 48
